ast.name: textContent
ast.source: To make the current device as main, click on ->
ast.target: 要将当前设备设为主设备，请点击 ->

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: To create a new bot click on ->
ast.target: 要创建新的机器人，请点击 ->

ast.name: title
ast.source: Generate a concise and clear title for the note (maximum 50 characters, no punctuation at the end)
ast.target: 为笔记生成一个简洁明了的标题（最多50个字符，末尾无标点）

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: parameter is already configured by default. Use
ast.target: 已默认配置。请在路径模板中使用

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: in path templates for automatic note title generation.

ast.name: error
ast.target: 接收数据时发生未处理的错误

ast.name: error
ast.target: 未处理的 Promise 拒绝

ast.name: error
ast.source: error: Internal handling of The Offset Infinite Loop failed
ast.target: 错误：内部处理偏移无限循环失败

ast.name: error
ast.source: error: You may receive already-processed updates on app restart
ast.target: 错误：应用重启时您可能会收到已处理的更新

ast.name: error
ast.source: Ignoring encoding parameter as this stream is being piped to another stream which makes the encoding option invalid.
ast.target: 忽略编码参数，因为此流正在被管道传输到另一个流，这使得编码选项无效。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Extra content at the end of the document

ast.name: error
ast.target: 处理 AI 变量时出错：

ast.name: error
ast.target: 使用自定义提示处理时出错：

ast.name: error
ast.target: 直接 AI 请求错误：

ast.name: info
ast.source: The server closed the connection while sending
ast.target: 服务器在发送时关闭了连接

ast.name: info
ast.target: 未断开连接（当前已无连接）

ast.name: info
ast.source: Got timeout while downloading file, retrying once
ast.target: 下载文件时超时，正在重试一次

ast.name: info
ast.target: 文件位于另一个数据中心

ast.name: log
ast.source: Logger.setLevel is deprecated, it will has no effect. Please, use client.setLogLevel instead.
ast.target: Logger.setLevel 已弃用，将不再生效。请改用 client.setLogLevel。

ast.name: log
ast.source: sender already has some hanging states. reconnecting
ast.target: 发送方已有一些挂起状态。正在重连。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enter your pin code. Numbers and letters only.
ast.target: 输入您的 PIN 码。仅限数字和字母。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 输入您的 Telegram 机器人令牌。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enter list of usernames or chat ids that should be processed. At least your username must be entered.
ast.target: 输入需要处理的用户名或聊天 ID 列表。至少必须输入您的用户名。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Specify the device to be used for sync when running Obsidian simultaneously on multiple desktops. If not specified, the priority will shift unpredictably.
ast.target: 指定在多个桌面端同时运行 Obsidian 时用于同步的设备。如果未指定，优先级将不可预测地转移。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Encrypt the bot token for enhanced security. When enabled, a pin code is required at each Obsidian launch.
ast.target: 加密机器人令牌以增强安全性。启用后，每次启动 Obsidian 都需要输入 PIN 码。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enter your password before scanning the code only if you use two-step authorization. Password will not be stored
ast.target: 仅在使用两步验证时，才需要在扫描代码前输入您的密码。密码不会被存储。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Open the Telegram app and link your device
ast.target: 打开 Telegram 应用并链接您的设备

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Generate code and point your phone at it to confirm login
ast.target: 生成代码并将手机对准它以确认登录

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The session will appear in the list of active sessions
ast.target: 会话将出现在活动会话列表中

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Template for note path and filename. Use {{category}}, {{date:YYYY-MM}}, {{content:20}}, {{ai:custom_param}} etc. Include .md extension.
ast.target: 笔记路径和文件名的模板。使用 {{category}}、{{date:YYYY-MM}}、{{content:20}}、{{ai:custom_param}} 等。请包含 .md 扩展名。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Override file path template from message distribution rules. Leave empty to use default file path template.
ast.target: 覆盖消息分发规则中的文件路径模板。留空则使用默认文件路径模板。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Keywords for automatic categorization (comma-separated). Works in addition to message distribution rules, not as replacement. Used for AI classification and additional tagging.
ast.target: 用于自动分类的关键词（逗号分隔）。与消息分发规则配合使用，而非替代。用于 AI 分类和额外标记。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Path to template file for notes in this category (optional). ⚠️ Beta feature: Template functionality is experimental and may change.
ast.target: 此类别笔记的模板文件路径（可选）。⚠️ 测试版功能：模板功能是实验性的，可能会更改。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Name of the parameter (will be used as {{ai:name}})

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Prompt that describes what AI should generate for this parameter
ast.target: 描述 AI 应为此参数生成什么内容的提示词

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Create a new category for organizing notes
ast.target: 创建一个用于整理笔记的新类别

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Create custom AI parameters for use in category note path templates ({{ai:parameter_name}}). Only works when AI categorization is enabled.
ast.target: 创建自定义 AI 参数，用于类别笔记路径模板（{{ai:parameter_name}}）。仅在启用 AI 分类时有效。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Conditions by which you would like to filter messages. Leave the field blank if you want to apply this rule to all messages
ast.target: 您希望用于过滤消息的条件。如果想将此规则应用于所有消息，请将此字段留空。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Specify path to template file you want to apply to new notes
ast.target: 指定您想要应用于新笔记的模板文件路径

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Specify path template for storage folders and note names. Leave empty if you don't want to create any notes from filtrated messages
ast.target: 指定存储文件夹和笔记名称的路径模板。如果您不想从过滤后的消息创建任何笔记，请留空。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Specify path template for storage folders and file names. Leave empty if you don't want to save any files from filtrated messages
ast.target: 指定存储文件夹和文件名的路径模板。如果您不想保存过滤后的消息中的任何文件，请留空。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Specify the heading under which new messages will be inserted
ast.target: 指定新消息将插入到哪个标题下

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Turn on to have new messages appear at the beginning of the note, or, if a heading is specified, above it. This may disrupt message order if parallel processing is enabled
ast.target: 开启后，新消息将出现在笔记的开头，或者如果指定了标题，则出现在标题上方。如果启用了并行处理，这可能会打乱消息顺序。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use vision for image analysis (requires compatible model)
ast.target: 使用视觉功能进行图像分析（需要兼容的模型）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Controls randomness (0-2). Lower = more focused, higher = more creative
ast.target: 控制随机性（0-2）。较低值 = 更专注，较高值 = 更具创造性

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Number of retry attempts for failed requests

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Base delay between retries (will increase exponentially)
ast.target: 重试之间的基础延迟（将呈指数增长）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Maximum time to wait for API response
ast.target: 等待 API 响应的最长时间

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Applied to all processed content for final formatting. Used when no specific prompt is set or as a final formatting step.
ast.target: 应用于所有处理内容的最终格式化。当未设置特定提示词时使用，或作为最终格式化步骤。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 图像的处理（需要视觉 API）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Processing for voice messages, audio files, and videos
ast.target: 语音消息、音频文件和视频的处理

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Processing for web links sent in messages (via r.jina.ai)
ast.target: 消息中发送的网页链接的处理（通过 r.jina.ai）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Turn off for using a custom delimiter, which you can set in the template file
ast.target: 关闭以使用自定义分隔符，您可以在模板文件中设置它

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Turn on for faster message and file processing. Caution: may disrupt message order
ast.target: 开启以加快消息和文件处理速度。注意：可能会打乱消息顺序

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose when you want to see the connection status indicator
ast.target: 选择您希望何时看到连接状态指示器

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set the action to mark a message as processed. Delete will remove messages from Telegram after processing.
ast.target: 设置将消息标记为已处理的操作。删除将在处理后从 Telegram 中移除消息。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose the emoji reaction for processed messages
ast.target: 选择用于已处理消息的 emoji 反应

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose chats with your connected bot in which to search for old messages. Only chats with activity in the last 30 days will be available. If no chat is chosen, old message processing will not occur
ast.target: 选择您连接的机器人所在的聊天，以搜索旧消息。仅限过去 30 天内有活动的聊天可用。如果未选择任何聊天，则不会进行旧消息处理。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Connect your Telegram bot. It's required for all features.
ast.target: 连接您的 Telegram 机器人。所有功能都需要它。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Connect your Telegram user. It's required only for
ast.target: 连接您的 Telegram 用户。仅在需要时才需要。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: During the plugin loading, unprocessed messages that are older than 24 hours and are not accessible to the bot will be forwarded to the same chat using the connected user's account. This action will enable the bot to detect and process these messages
ast.target: 在插件加载期间，超过 24 小时且机器人无法访问的未处理消息将使用已连接用户的账户转发到同一聊天。此操作将使机器人能够检测并处理这些消息。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Process messages through AI before saving. Each content type can have its own prompt.
ast.target: 在保存前通过 AI 处理消息。每种内容类型都可以有自己的提示词。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Configure AI prompts for different content types (text, voice, photos, etc.)
ast.target: 为不同内容类型（文本、语音、照片等）配置 AI 提示词

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Extract text from documents locally to save costs and improve speed
ast.target: 在本地从文档中提取文本以节省成本并提高速度

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically categorize notes based on content
ast.target: 根据内容自动分类笔记

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Base folder for URL-only messages when AI web links processing is disabled (path: folder/domain.md)
ast.target: 当禁用 AI 网页链接处理时，仅包含 URL 的消息的基础文件夹（路径：folder/domain.md）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use AI to automatically determine note categories
ast.target: 使用 AI 自动确定笔记类别

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable AI processing first to use AI categorization
ast.target: 请先启用 AI 处理以使用 AI 分类

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Save notes to folders based on categories
ast.target: 根据类别将笔记保存到文件夹

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Category for notes that don't match any rules
ast.target: 不匹配任何规则的笔记的类别

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Add, edit, or remove note categories
ast.target: 添加、编辑或删除笔记类别

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Bot token encryption using a pin code
ast.target: 使用 PIN 码加密机器人令牌

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.target: 关键词1, 关键词2, 关键词3

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.source: E.g., determine project name from text (maximum 20 characters)
ast.target: 例如：从文本中确定项目名称（最多20个字符）

ast.name: setText
ast.source: - it can get only messages sent within the last 24 hours
ast.target: - 它只能获取过去24小时内发送的消息

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Use a proxy to bypass blocks in some countries and limited corporate networks
ast.target: 使用代理绕过某些国家和受限企业网络的封锁

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Error getting sender to reconnect to
ast.target: 获取重连发送方时出错

ast.name: warn
ast.target: [重连] 正在关闭当前连接...

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Got two timeouts in a row while downloading file
ast.target: 下载文件时连续两次超时

ast.name: warn
ast.source: options.requestBodyStream is deprecated, please pass the request object to stream.pipe.
ast.target: options.requestBodyStream已弃用，请将请求对象传递给stream.pipe。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Please fill both parameter name and prompt
ast.target: 请同时填写参数名称和提示

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Parameter name must contain only letters, numbers and underscores, and start with a letter or underscore
ast.target: 参数名称只能包含字母、数字和下划线，且必须以字母或下划线开头

ast.name: description
ast.source: Websocket Client & Server Library implementing the WebSocket protocol as specified in RFC 6455.
ast.target: 实现RFC 6455中指定的WebSocket协议的WebSocket客户端和服务器库。

ast.name: description
ast.source: GPT-4o, GPT-4o-mini with Vision API support

ast.name: error
ast.source: failed to parse address with port
ast.target: 解析带端口的地址失败

ast.name: error
ast.source: failed to parse address from URL

ast.name: message
ast.source: 💳 Quota exceeded. Please top up balance at platform.openai.com
ast.target: 💳 配额已用尽。请在 platform.openai.com 充值余额

ast.name: message
ast.source: 🔑 API key is invalid or revoked
ast.target: 🔑 API 密钥无效或已被吊销

ast.name: text
ast.source: Process and structure this text, make it more readable and informative.
ast.target: 处理并结构化此文本，使其更具可读性和信息量。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Bot token encryption provides additional security
ast.target: 机器人令牌加密提供额外安全性

ast.name: text
ast.source: Create custom AI parameters for use in path templates. Parameters can be used as {{ai:parameter_name}} in Note Path Template and File Path Override.
ast.target: 创建自定义 AI 参数以在路径模板中使用。参数可在笔记路径模板和文件路径覆盖中用作 {{ai:parameter_name}}。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No categories yet. Create your first category!
ast.target: 暂无分类。创建您的第一个分类！

ast.name: text
ast.source: Template variables documentation is available in the plugin docs
ast.target: 模板变量文档可在插件文档中找到

ast.name: text
ast.source: Configure prompts for different content types. Each content type can have its own specific prompt for AI processing.
ast.target: 为不同类型的内容配置提示。每种内容类型都可以有其特定的 AI 处理提示。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Use the toggle to enable/disable processing for that type. Write your custom prompt in the text area below.
ast.target: 使用开关启用/禁用该类型的处理。在下方文本区域编写您的自定义提示。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Additional features available with user authorization
ast.target: 用户授权后可使用附加功能

ast.name: title
ast.source: Generate a concise and clear title for the note (maximum 50 characters, no punctuation at the end)
ast.target: 为笔记生成简洁清晰的标题（最多 50 个字符，结尾无标点）
